description: Seam Owner Registry - defines single ownership for cross-cutting topics to prevent duplication
governance_rule: Non-owner modules must LINK to owner definitions, not redefine them

error_model.description: Error codes, error response shapes, failure taxonomy
error_model.link_instruction: Reference contracts module for error definitions. Do not define error codes locally.

schema_truth.description: Entity schemas, data models, field definitions, constraints
schema_truth.link_instruction: Reference database module for schema definitions. Do not duplicate entity structures.

identity.description: User identity, authentication flows, session management, authorization rules
identity.link_instruction: Reference auth module for identity definitions. Do not define auth rules locally.

webhooks.description: Webhook contracts, event payloads, delivery guarantees, retry policies
webhooks.link_instruction: Reference integrations module for webhook specs. Do not define event shapes locally.

correlation_ids.description: Request tracing, correlation ID propagation, distributed tracing standards
correlation_ids.link_instruction: Reference systems module for tracing standards. Do not define correlation patterns locally.

api_versioning.description: API version strategy, deprecation policy, breaking change rules
api_versioning.link_instruction: Reference backend module for versioning policy. Do not define version rules locally.

feature_flags.description: Feature flag definitions, rollout rules, targeting logic
feature_flags.link_instruction: Reference state module for feature flag definitions. Do not define flags locally.

reason_codes.SEAM_OWNER_VIOLATION: Non-owner module defines content that belongs to the seam owner
reason_codes.SEAM_MISSING_LINK: Module references a seam topic without linking to owner
reason_codes.SEAM_DUPLICATE_DEFINITION: Same definition appears in both owner and non-owner module
